case_title: CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF VS. JORGE CONTRERAS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVARLY INVESTMENTS, LLC , AS ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED DEC-12-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JORGE
